modifications.TOOLS.md:
# TOOLS — Configuration (post-refactor)

Tooling Summary
- Backup/Restore: Node.js scripts (fs, path, crypto) with improved logging
- Validation: SHA-256 hashing with per-file status and summary
- Egress Scan: Optional, decoupled from backup lifecycle

Local Settings
- Backup root: ./backups
- Named backup root: ./backups/named
- Hash algorithm: SHA-256
- Concurrency: 2 (safe parallel reads)

Operational Notes
- Still zero external dependencies
- openclaw.json sanitized to openclaw.sanitized.json in backups
- manifest.json includes size, hash, exists=true for core files

notes: Simulate a broken workspace where AGENTS.md was deleted and TOOLS.md was edited.
